unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * * 'pingpong' is for generic back-and-forth support functions used by FTP, * IMAP, POP3, SMTP and whatever more that likes them. * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */
/* Returns timeout in ms. 0 or negative number means the timeout has already triggered */

function.name: Curl_pp_state_timeout
Curl_pp_statemach
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct pingpong *pp, bool block, bool disconnecting)

unit.comment: /* initialize stuff to prepare for reading a fresh new response */

function.name: Curl_pp_init

unit.comment: /*********************************************************************** * * Curl_pp_vsendf() * * Send the formatted string as a command to a pingpong server. Note that * the string should not have any CRLF appended, as this function will * append the necessary things itself. * * made to never block */

function.name: Curl_pp_vsendf
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct pingpong *pp, const char *fmt, va_list args)

unit.comment: /*********************************************************************** * * Curl_pp_sendf() * * Send the formatted string as a command to a pingpong server. Note that * the string should not have any CRLF appended, as this function will * append the necessary things itself. * * made to never block */

function.name: Curl_pp_sendf
pingpong_read
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, int sockindex, char *buffer, size_t buflen, ssize_t *nread)

unit.comment: /* * Curl_pp_readresp() * * Reads a piece of a server response. */

function.name: Curl_pp_readresp
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, int sockindex, struct pingpong *pp, int *code, /* return the server code if done */ size_t *size)

function.name: Curl_pp_getsock
Curl_pp_flushsend
